response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced polyglot engineer with a genuine open-source pedigree (founder of GISCollective, D-language libraries, FOSS4G speaker) and strong Linux credentials, which align well with the technical side of this role. However, the position is an executive leadership role requiring minimum C1 German, and his resume self-reports only basic German — a hard disqualifier for a client-facing consulting lead in this market. He also lacks demonstrated team leadership or technical project management at the level required: his roles are individual-contributor senior/staff positions, with no evidence of UML-driven design, requirements management, or IT security/compliance advisory work.
strengths: 20 years of hands-on development across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Authentic open-source track record: founded GISCollective, maintains D libraries, speaks at FOSS4G
Strong Linux/DevOps background including Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, and GitLab infrastructure
concerns: German listed as basic; the role requires C1 minimum for client advisory work
No formal team leadership, people management, or executive-level experience on the resume
No evidence of UML modeling, requirements management, or IT security/risk/compliance expertise

key_factors.factor: Deep open-source and Linux engineering experience
